content:
The Artist: Han

HanRGB is a Turkish designer and generative artist best known for creating CryptoCubes, a collection of 256 unique digital landmarks that blend conceptual minimalism with high-tech aesthetics. His work puts the sculptures of the future on-chain, making their relevance permanently accessible. Virtual architecture is celebrated at The Line and we host a custom CryptoCube in the lobby of The Line. 

https://videos.files.wordpress.com/mPsdX18m/screen-recording-2025-01-22-at-9.39.34e280afam.mov

The Collection: Cryptocubes

CryptoCubes was released in October 2020, way before the JPEG summer of 2021. HanRGB’s pieces are widely recognized for their elegance, with the 'sparse' volume trait particularly sought after.

A Specific Artwork: CryptoCube #102

#102 is of the Landmark 'B' trait variant. These are compact and the most common of the Landmark forms. Sweet aqua color palette making this early three dimensional object the ideal addition to your historical NFT collection. Early on these didn't get a lot of heat because the thumbnail on marketplaces wasn't representative of the true craftmanship of Han. That has now changed, as has Han's evolution of how Crypto Cubes are presented on cryptocubes.io. You can even make your own Crypto Cube.

https://youtu.be/Lsw_ekgiEHE HanRGB | Line 254
